videos.headline: Tennessee bats down App State's last gasp chance in OT
videos.description: On fourth down, Taylor Lamb's pass into the end zone is knocked away by Micah Abernathy and Appalachian State falls to Tennessee 20-13.

videos.headline: No. 9 Tennessee survives scare from Appalachian State
videos.description: Appalachian State takes a 13-3 lead into halftime, but Tennessee rallies to force overtime where Joshua Dobbs gets hit hard and fumbles the ball at the goal line but Jalen Hurd is there for the touchdown to lift the Volunteers to a 20-13 victory.
